Veigar.trading_pattern: Veigar stacks early. Trade before stacks. Respect cage.
Veigar.early_game: Abuse before stacks. Poke with Q.
Veigar.mid_game: Roam to deny picks. Avoid his cage.
Veigar.scaling: Veigar outscales — stacking makes him stronger

Katarina.trading_pattern: Katarina has all-in. Play defensive, use Q poke.
Katarina.early_game: Play safe. Katarina has strong all-in.
Katarina.mid_game: Roam when she farms. Make picks.
Katarina.scaling: Taliyah outscales — your roaming improves late

LeBlanc.trading_pattern: LeBlanc has burst and deception. Play defensive.
LeBlanc.ability_to_dodge: LeBlanc E (Chains) — dodge by moving away.
LeBlanc.early_game: Play very defensive. LeBlanc has superior burst.
LeBlanc.mid_game: Roam when she farms. Make picks.
LeBlanc.scaling: Taliyah outscales — your roaming improves late

Zed.trading_pattern: Zed has mobility and burst. Trade when W down.
Zed.ability_to_dodge: Zed W (Living Shadow) — back off when he clones.
Zed.early_game: Play defensively. Zed has strong all-in.
Zed.mid_game: Roam when he farms. Make picks.
Zed.scaling: Taliyah outscales — your roaming improves late

Azir.trading_pattern: Azir is weak early. Use Q spam and roam.
Azir.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Roam early.
Azir.scaling: Azir outscales — his teamfight control improves late

Ryze.trading_pattern: Ryze is weak early. Use Q spam and roam.
Ryze.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Roam early.
Ryze.scaling: Ryze outscales — his teamfight control improves late

Qiyana.trading_pattern: Qiyana has burst and CC. Play defensive.
Qiyana.ability_to_dodge: Qiyana E (Audacity) — step back when she dashes.
Qiyana.early_game: Play defensively. Qiyana has strong all-in.
Qiyana.mid_game: Roam to deny her picks. Scale with team.
Qiyana.scaling: Taliyah slightly favored — your roaming is superior

Orianna.trading_pattern: Orianna has similar poke. Trade when ball far.
Orianna.ability_to_dodge: Orianna Q (Command) — dodge by stepping back.
Orianna.early_game: Mirror her. Both have similar early.
Orianna.scaling: Orianna slightly favored — her teamfight control is superior
Orianna.positioning: Use Q to farm. Roam frequently.

Swain.trading_pattern: Swain has tankiness and CC. Trade when E down.
Swain.mid_game: Roam while he farms. Make picks.
Swain.scaling: Taliyah outscales — your roaming improves late

Cho'Gath.trading_pattern: Cho'Gath is melee. Use Q spam to poke.
Cho'Gath.ability_to_dodge: Cho'Gath Q (Rupture) — dodge by moving perpendicular.
Cho'Gath.early_game: Abuse with Q spam. Roam early.
Cho'Gath.scaling: Cho'Gath outscales — his tankiness increases late

Ekko.trading_pattern: Ekko is mobile. Trade when abilities down.
Ekko.scaling: Even — both scale at similar rates
Ekko.positioning: Use Q to farm. Roam frequently.

Cassiopeia.trading_pattern: Cassio has sustained poke. Trade when W down.
Cassiopeia.mid_game: Roam while she farms. Make picks.
Cassiopeia.scaling: Cassiopeia outscales — her sustained damage dominates late
Cassiopeia.positioning: Use Q to farm. Avoid poison. Roam frequently.

Smolder.trading_pattern: Smolder very weak early. Spam Q and roam.
Smolder.early_game: Dominate with Q spam. Roam heavily.
Smolder.scaling: Smolder significantly outscales — you need major lead

Akshan.trading_pattern: Akshan has mobility and poke. Trade carefully.
Akshan.ability_to_dodge: Akshan E (Grapple) — step back when he grapples.
Akshan.mid_game: Roam while he farms. Make picks.
Akshan.scaling: Taliyah outscales — your roaming improves late
